message:
🐛 Remove duplicate card and complete Add Cards catalog (#444)

* 📖 Update INVENTORY.md and fix missing isDemoData flags

- Update INVENTORY.md counts: 110→143 cards
- Add 35 new cards to inventory (resources, events, deploy, AI)
- Add isDemoData: true flag to 5 cards that were missing it:
  - active-alerts.ts
  - network-overview.ts
  - security-issues.ts
  - storage-overview.ts
  - top-pods.ts
- Add demo data coverage stats to summary

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Remove duplicate operator-subscriptions card and complete Add Cards catalog

- Remove legacy operator-subscriptions.ts (duplicate of operator_subscription_status)
- Update AddCardModal to use operator_subscription_status
- Add 18 missing resource status cards to CARD_CATALOG:
  - Workloads: daemonset_status, statefulset_status, replicaset_status,
    job_status, cronjob_status, hpa_status
  - Network: ingress_status, network_policy_status
  - Storage: pv_status
  - Compute: node_status
  - Namespaces: namespace_status, resource_quota_status, limit_range_status
  - Data Compliance: secret_status, configmap_status, service_account_status,
    role_status, role_binding_status

Now 143 unified card configs with 145 catalog entries (142 unique cards
shown in Add Cards dialog).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

-/**
- * Operator Subscriptions Card Configuration (legacy name)
- */
-import type { UnifiedCardConfig } from '../../lib/unified/types'
-
-export const operatorSubscriptionsConfig: UnifiedCardConfig = {
-  type: 'operator_subscriptions',
-  title: 'Operator Subscriptions',
-  category: 'operators',
-  description: 'OLM Operator Subscriptions',
-  icon: 'RefreshCw',
-  iconColor: 'text-violet-400',
-  defaultWidth: 6,
-  defaultHeight: 3,
-  dataSource: { type: 'hook', hook: 'useOperatorSubscriptions' },
-  filters: [
-    { field: 'search', type: 'text', placeholder: 'Search subscriptions...', searchFields: ['name', 'namespace', 'channel'], storageKey: 'operator-subs' },
-  ],
-  content: {
-    type: 'list',
-    pageSize: 10,
-    columns: [
-      { field: 'name', header: 'Name', primary: true, render: 'truncate' },
-      { field: 'namespace', header: 'Namespace', render: 'namespace-badge', width: 100 },
-      { field: 'channel', header: 'Channel', render: 'text', width: 80 },
-      { field: 'installPlanApproval', header: 'Approval', render: 'status-badge', width: 90 },
-    ],
-  },
-  emptyState: { icon: 'RefreshCw', title: 'No Subscriptions', message: 'No Operator Subscriptions found', variant: 'info' },
-  loadingState: { type: 'list', rows: 5, showSearch: true },
-  isDemoData: false,
-  isLive: true,
-}
-export default operatorSubscriptionsConfig
